content.content: {'Breizh Café': '109 Rue Vieille du Temple, 75003 Paris, France'}

Here's the summary of my findings:

---

### The Best (and Only) French Cuisine Restaurant Open on Sunday in Paris

Out of all the Paris restaurants, only four serve French cuisine, and **Breizh Café** is the sole one open on Sundays. Here are its details:

| Detail | Info |
|---|---|
| **Name** | Breizh Café |
| **Cuisine** | French |
| **Rating** | ⭐ 3.9 / 5.0 |
| **Address** | 109 Rue Vieille du Temple, 75003 Paris, France |
| **Operating Hours** | 9:00 AM – 11:00 PM |
| **Open Days** | Monday, Tuesday, Thursday, Friday, Saturday, **Sunday** |

**Highlights from reviews:** Best crêpes in Paris — both sweet and savory. They also serve authentic Breton cider with artisanal ingredients and offer gluten-free buckwheat crêpes. It can get busy during peak hours, so plan accordingly!

The other French restaurants — **Le Baratin** (4.8), **Bistrot Paul Bert** (4.5), and **Chez L'Ami Jean** (4.4) — are all rated higher but unfortunately are closed on Sundays.

Would you like me to make a reservation at Breizh Café for your Sunday arrival?
